key_themes: 人工智能基建与瓶颈投资
人形机器人商业化替代劳动力
光电/光子学供应链结构性紧缺
aleabitoreddit.recent_shift: 近期从超大规模云厂商叙事转向人形机器人与物理AI作为下一轮增长核心。
representative_quotes: Lot of people keep saying humanoids can’t do X or Y task today… It’s clear to me and VC that we’ve just hit the inflection point where soon: majority of labor you think is human-only, can be replaced by robotics/humanoids.

The entire optical components industry today is facing a severe shortage of critical components... The top three laser suppliers control 68% of the market and they’re completely sold out for the next two years.
Hard to see a world where US AI hyperscaler capex drops dramatically... When China entities go and claim they now have an 'AI cyber nuclear weapon'... We're witnessing the modern cold war.

key_themes: 宏观风险上升（伊朗局势，美国债务，失业率）
特朗普交易与利益冲突
unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期观点从关注特朗普交易和AI机会转向更强调市场脆弱性，如多项见顶指标触发、黄金下跌、衰退担忧加剧。
representative_quotes: BREAKING: 7 out of 10 market peak indicators have now been triggered, per Bank of America
Traders are expecting a Fed rate hike by December, per Bloomberg.
BREAKING: Michael Burry disclosed new short positions against Nvidia, $NVDA, Tesla, $TSLA, Caterpillar, $CAT, and Applied Materials, $AMAT.

key_themes: 存储芯片主导AI产业链，海力士为绝对核心
玻璃基板与光纤加速推进，康宁成下一代AI底座
杠杆交易风险极大，仓位管理优于选股
物理AI和太空算力为长期方向但需谨慎
xiaomustock.recent_shift: 最近对智能体前景转为悲观，认为Meta和国内公司投入意义不大，同时强调玻璃基板和康宁的重要性上升
